productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Blue Shirt
description: Composition Blue shirt made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with double buttoned cuffs, narrow collar with removable stiffeners, buttoned placket with pearlescent blue buttons, branding embroidered on left chest and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash delicate Wash and dry inside out Line dry in shade Warm iron Dry clean delicate Do not wring, do not tumble dry, do not bleach  The blue fabric with its silky sheen gives this blue shirt an exclusive, luxurious look, it's a cut above the standard formal shirt. Impeccable construction, attention to detail and smart stripes place this shirt firmly ahead of the pack &ndash wear with confidence tucked into formal trousers. Model statistics The model wears a size M in shirts with height 6' and shoulders 18"
